purpose: Maps pre-Lv94 (base) potencies vs post-Lv94 (mastery trait) potencies for level-scaled modeling
source_priority: 1. Official job guide (na.finalfantasyxiv.com/jobguide/) = current patch potencies (Lv100, post-all-traits)
2. consolegameswiki.com/wiki/ Notes sections = pre-trait potencies (verified against patch notes)
3. Patch notes (lodestone) = historical changes, delta confirmation

global_traits.note: These affect ALL damage actions. Pre-50: x1.0, 50-59: x1.1, 60+: x1.2. Baked into damage formula, not tooltips.

notes: Wiki states Dynamic Dancer sets Saber Dance to 520 and Fan Dance IV to 420
Official job guide (7.5) shows Saber Dance at 540 and Fan Dance IV at 460
Discrepancy likely from Patch 7.1 hotfix potency adjustments post-launch
AUTHORITATIVE: Official site values (540, 460) are current patch truth
Pre-94 values from wiki Notes sections are correct (500, 300 respectively)
Apex Arrow scales linearly with Soul Voice gauge above minimum cost (20)
At 80+ gauge pre-94: ~430p. At 80+ gauge post-94: ~600p
Sidewinder gets the largest single boost (+25%) among BRD skills

methodology.verification: Cross-referenced with Patch 7.0 history entries on each wiki page
methodology.discrepancy_resolution: When wiki trait text conflicts with official site tooltip, official site wins (may reflect post-launch hotfixes)

remaining_jobs_needed: All melee DPS have 'Melee Mastery' at Lv94 (DRG, MNK, NIN, SAM, RPR, VPR)
All tanks have equivalent trait (PLD, WAR, DRK, GNB)
All casters have 'Magic Mastery' equivalent (BLM, SMN, RDM, PCT)
Same pattern: wiki Notes section has pre-trait values
